options.a: It is the wind that experiences an increase in the Coriolis effect brought about by the increase in friction near to the surface.
options.b: It is the wind that results when the pressure gradient in the layer of air near to the surface is reduced by the effect of friction.
options.c: It is the airflow near to the surface that slows down due to the effect of an increase in air density.
options.d: It is the airflow near to the surface that is reduced in strength by the effect of friction.
